name: Orange Streusel Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup oil (I used extra-virgin olive oil; canola oil would also work)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt until combined.
3. Add egg, milk, orange juice, and oil to the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
4. Fold in orange zest until evenly distributed.
5. Pour batter into prepared loaf pan and spread evenly.
6. Sprinkle streusel topping over the batter using your fingers or a fork.
7. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
